text: The text of this passage is not above suspicion. Neither the beginning of verse 3 nor the end of verse 4 can be said to suit Job’s own position; even if we regard them as quotations (the one from 38.2 and the other from 40.2) they have no obvious relation to the context. Nor is the sense of the contrast in verse 5 by any means clear.
‘Cassia’; an aromatic bark, perhaps cinnamon. ‘Dark Eye-lids’; literally ‘Pot of Antimony’, which was used as a cosmetic.
